<parameter=code>
# Green square didn't move with UP/RIGHT. Let me check current state more carefully.
# Maybe the green square is blocked or needs a different approach.

for n in seg['nodes']:

        boundary = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in boundary)
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in boundary)
        if min_col < 34:  # Left panel
            print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, min_pos=({min_row},{min_col}), hash={n['hash'][:8]}")

# Let me try moving LEFT to see if green square can move

result = action([{'action': 'LEFT'}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:

seg = current_frame.segmentation
